steps.title: Enter the two given points
steps.content: This question gives two exact values of a linear function: $h(0)=0$ and $h(11)=5$. Enter those as the points $(0,0)$ and $(11,5)$ in Desmos.

steps.title: Use linear regression
steps.content: Type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=\frac{5}{11}$ and $b=0$, so $h(x)=\frac{5}{11}x$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A matches the regression equation. It also checks directly: $h(0)=0$ and $h(11)=\frac{5}{11}(11)=5$, so choice A is correct.
